ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for logging into the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, maintenance technician, dispatcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the fleet */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of reefers in the fleet */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleets_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reefers" (
  "reefer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reefer */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the reefer belongs to */,
  "reefer_number" TEXT /* Reefer number for identification */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the reefer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the reefer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the reefer was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date when the next service is due */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the reefer */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range the reefer can maintain */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the reefer in cubic meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reefer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reefers_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "reefer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reefer assigned to the order */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number for reference */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client placing the order */,
  "client_contact" TEXT /* Contact person at the client's end */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the shipment */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the shipment */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  "shipment_type" TEXT /* Type of goods being transported */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_reefer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reefer_id") REFERENCES reefers ("reefer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "reefer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reefer that was serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "service_duration" REAL /* Duration of the service in hours */,
  "service_cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_scheduled" TEXT /* Date for the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_reefer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reefer_id") REFERENCES reefers ("reefer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the technician */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_number" TEXT /* Test case number for reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for logging into the system */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet used in the test case */,
  "text_value" TEXT /* Text value used in the test case */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the test case */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* User who executed the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reefer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reefer the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., maintenance due, service overdue) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_acknowledged_by FOREIGN KEY ("acknowledged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reefer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reefer_id") REFERENCES reefers ("reefer_id")
)
